summary:
The information does not support that LB-100 sensitizes ovarian cancer cells to cisplatin because there is no reference to this drug in existing literature related to ovarian carcinoma treatment. Therefore, based solely on current knowledge, LB-100 has no established role in enhancing cisplatin efficacy against ovarian carcinoma.

Final Answer: No
